race.comment: ZAKOUMA (8) has always promised a good level of ability and resumed with an impressive win first up at Caulfield Heath in a Class 1, charging home from back in the field to go on and score by 2.25 lengths. He's drawn very wide here which isn't ideal but 1800m will suit and he can prove too strong late once more. FIGLIO D'ARGENTO (4) is the one with map favours, drawn in and likely to settle on speed. He'll take catching, as could SAVISANTA (12) who struggled second up off an easy fresh win. He can bounce back third up at peak fitness. LARIO (10) is going well without winning and has each-way claims.
